case_title: JOHN DUNNING VS. AT & T ADVERTISING, L.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DUNNING, JOHN DBA BUDGET AUTO GLASS AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T ADVERTISING, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPERANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNNING, JOHN DBA BUDGET AUTO GLASS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AT & T ADVERTISING, L.P. $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60.00, THE CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT IS RESCINDED EFFECTIVE THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO MAKE ANY FURTHER PAYMENTS ON THE CONTRACT AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT NEED TO PERFORM ANY FURTHER SERVICES UNDER THE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT & T ADVERTISING, L.P.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-30-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T ADVERTISING, L.P.
